place.summary: The Peninsula functions primarily as a connector in Hong Kong's visitor network. Its strongest observed source market is PH. It receives notable inbound connections from Hong Kong Disneyland. Visitors often continue to Victoria Harbour. It performs above its category average on observed experience.

inbound.origin_poi_name: Hong Kong Convention and Exhibition Centre

opportunity_cards.title: Frequent companion: Victoria Harbour
opportunity_cards.detail: The Peninsula frequently appears alongside Victoria Harbour, suggesting cross-promotion or route packaging potential.
